creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed Mar 20 12:46:33  2024 UTC, koinec@yahoo.co.jp wrote:
> Also, I'm new to creating a FreeBSD's kernel patch.
> If you find any problems with the posting method, source code style, etc., I
> would be happy if you could tell me how to deal with them.

Thanks a lot for your submission! Indeed, new driver submissions
fit much better into the FreeBSD review system, rather than into
the bug database. Can you please file your patch queue at:

https://reviews.freebsd.org/differential/

That will draw more attention from people who can review and
commit your submission.
